title: Vanilla Edit
body:
This is a PvP-oriented vanilla texture pack. It has all the important things one would expect in a PvP texture pack along with some purely cosmetic stuff, such as item/block texture animations, custom skyboxes, etc.

### Main Features
- Low Fire
- Low Shield
- Short Swords
- Small Particles (some are also invisible, such as explosion and most hit particles)
- Small Totem Pop Animation
  
[Skyboxify](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyboxify) is neseccary for custom skyboxes to work.

## Credits
- Small Totem Pop Animation by [pycat](https://github.com/pycatmc)
- [Night Skybox](https://www.stingrayproductionszone.com/milkyway-galaxy-night-sky) by [Ray Savage](https://www.stingrayproductionszone.com/)
- [Day Skybox](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/zel-s-dynamic-skies/) by [Zel (Fireon12064)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/fireon12064/)
